chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.366 of 2023 Mst. Laila Sarfaraz & another Versus Hussain A. Haroon & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 4392/23 2. For orders on CMA 4393/23 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA 4394/23 Dated: 16.10.2023 Mr. Isaac Ali Qazi for appellants. -.-.- Counsel is absolutely unable to satisfy this Court as to how the order dated 06.10.2023, whereby attendance of some of the alleged contemnors were sought by issuing of bailable warrants, could be questioned. As far as the alleged contempt is concerned, their (alleged contemnors) attendance is secured by issuance of bailable warrants as the counsel was unable to procure their attendance, as stated. The response is yet to be made/filed by the alleged contemnors and it is yet to be seen whether charge could be framed or otherwise. The appellants have unnecessarily filed this High Court Appeal as apparently in terms of the order impugned here, the appellants could neither aggrieved nor the appeal to such extent could have been filed. Instant High Court Appeal as such is dismissed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
